rationale: Adds inline card-form iframe rendering for ChangeNOW and Guardarian on /pay.html, plus an optional Banxa partner provider gated on env. public/pay.html introduces a new `<div class='embed-panel' id='cardEmbedPanel'>` containing an `<iframe id='cardEmbedFrame'>` with allow='payment; camera; microphone' and `referrerpolicy='no-referrer-when-downgrade'`; the bootstrap JS routes embeddable providers (data.embedUrl present) to render in this iframe (panel.scrollIntoView, btn.classList.remove('loading')), falling back to window.location.href = data.onrampUrl for non-embed providers. server-clean.js adds `buildChangeNowEmbedUrl` targeting `/embeds/exchange-widget/v2/widget.html` with address=USDT_TRC20_WALLET, `buildGuardarianEmbedUrl` targeting `/calculator/v1` with payout_address=USDT_TRC20_WALLET, and `buildBanxaUrl` targeting `https://${BANXA_PARTNER_SUBDOMAIN}.banxa.com/?...`. The /api/card-onramp response now includes `embedUrl` alongside `onrampUrl` for embeddable providers, and the /api/config response marks changenow/guardarian with `embeddable: true`. Banxa is OFF when env var is unset (CARD_ONRAMP_BANXA = Boolean(BANXA_PARTNER_SUBDOMAIN)) and pushed to first in CARD_ONRAMP_DEFAULT_PROVIDER chain only when set. .env.example documents BANXA_PARTNER_SUBDOMAIN with KYB caveats. Numbered step-list HTML (`<ol class='steps'>`) and supporting CSS (.notice .steps, .embed-panel) are added. The change is strictly additive (no existing provider is broken). Clean feature addition matching the PR body.
